text.title: Business Model Research Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Sub-1000-subscriber email tool
example.note: Founder pitches an email-marketing SaaS for solo creators. Step 1: value chain - content creators - ESP infra (SES) - subscribers; key cost driver is per-send infra + deliverability monitoring. Step 2: archetypes - pick subscription + one-time founding-creator lifetime deal; reject transaction, advertising, marketplace commission with one-liners. Step 3: comparables - ConvertKit, Beehiiv, Substack pricing pages pulled 2026-05-12, tagged Hard with URLs. Step 4: Canvas filled; gross margin sourced from Beehiiv deck = 62% (Hard). Step 5: P10 ARPU $9, churn 6%/mo, CAC $40 -> LTV <=60mo = $90, LTV:CAC = 2.3:1, payback 7mo. P50 ARPU $19, churn 3%, CAC $25 -> LTV $390, LTV:CAC 15.6:1. Step 6: stress tests - Scale ok, Competition ok, Churn (2x) marginal at P10 (LTV:CAC 1.1:1), CAC inflation flagged, Time-to-profit at P50 18mo. Verdict: viable-with-fixes; flag CAC channel concentration; require quarterly re-run.
